title: Le MonPack 3
description:
A peaceful Cobblemon modpack.
Build, decorate and catch 'em all with complete peace of mind.
body:
# Welcome to Le MonPack 3

The world that awaits you is a peaceful one.
Explore, mine, capture Pokémon and trade with villagers in peace. 

### Trade:
All village trades have been modified to suit this new world.

![Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku9iAThN/images/9dd06f994b4be78d58c4213aa5ff62f7f26b55f9.png)

### Explore:
A vast world awaits you. Use a variety of vehicles to explore it.

![Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku9iAThN/images/71a0e7d34074b86b801544219fbbac0f69d10aa0.png)

### Build:
Mods offer a wealth of possibilities for building a variety of different structures.

![Build](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku9iAThN/images/e7646f97675029fc0f2a376bc818507a25f6aae2.png)

### Decorate:
Sofa, tables, lamps... You'll have everything you need to decorate your home with taste.

![Decorate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku9iAThN/images/7aedc9bc86525db2f53019bf10d3103f970b21e7.png)

### Catch 'em all:
With Cobblemon and a host of add-ons, capture hundreds of different Pokémon.

![Capture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku9iAThN/images/1f6c6d1db9d252e982072e116cb76deaee551258.png)
